description.zh: 错误重试、优雅关机、会话持久化、A/B 测试等生产工程模式
description.en: Production patterns: error retry, graceful shutdown, session persistence, A/B testing

content.zh:
API 调用失败:
  Error: 529 API Overloaded
  → 启动指数退避重试
  → 等待 1s...
content.en:
API call failed:
  Error: 529 API Overloaded
  → Start exponential backoff retry
  → Wait 1s...

annotation.zh: 生产环境 API 不总是可用
annotation.en: Production APIs are not always available

content.zh:
重试 #1 (1s 后):
  Error: 529 API Overloaded
  → 等待 2s...

重试 #2 (2s 后):
  ✓ 200 OK
  → API 调用成功!

收到 SIGTERM 信号
→ 停止接受新任务
→ 等待 2 个进行中的任务...
→ 保存会话状态到磁盘
→ 关闭 MCP 连接
content.en:
Received SIGTERM signal
→ Stop accepting new tasks
→ Wait for 2 in-progress tasks...
→ Save session state to disk
→ Close MCP connections

annotation.zh: 优雅关机: 不丢失任何工作

content.zh:
会话持久化:
  .codebuddy/history/2024-03-15.db
  → messages[] (3.2 MB)
  → memory (18 条)
  → tool_results (压缩存储)

下次恢复时自动加载
content.en:
Session persistence:
  .codebuddy/history/2024-03-15.db
  → messages[] (3.2 MB)
  → memory (18 items)
  → tool_results (compressed)

Auto-load on next restore

annotation.zh: SQLite 持久化所有会话状态

content.zh:
A/B 测试分流:
  用户 ID hash → 0.73
  实验组: tengu_ultraplan_model
  → 使用 opus46 模型
  (对照组使用 sonnet45)
content.en:
A/B test routing:
  User ID hash → 0.73
  Experiment group: tengu_ultraplan_model
  → Use opus46 model
  (Control group uses sonnet45)

annotation.zh: GrowthBook feature flags 灰度放量

content.zh:
Token 预算保护:
  当前: 185K / 200K (92%)
  → L1 微压缩: 40K
  → L2 智能总结: 70K → 25K
  → 释放空间继续对话
content.en:
Token budget protection:
  Current: 185K / 200K (92%)
  → L1 micro-compression: 40K
  → L2 smart summarization: 70K → 25K
  → Free space for continued conversation

annotation.zh: 自动上下文管理,永不 OOM

content.zh:
生产级保障机制:

1. 错误重试 (指数退避)
2. 优雅关机 (SIGTERM处理)
3. 会话持久化 (SQLite)
4. A/B 测试 (GrowthBook)
5. 上下文压缩 (自动回收)
6. 权限引擎 (多层防护)
7. 链路追踪 (Jaeger)
8. 监控告警 (Sentry)
content.en:
Production safeguards:

1. Error retry (exponential backoff)
2. Graceful shutdown (SIGTERM handler)
3. Session persistence (SQLite)
4. A/B testing (GrowthBook)
5. Context compression (auto-reclaim)
6. Permission engine (multi-layer protection)
7. Tracing (Jaeger)
8. Monitoring & alerts (Sentry)

annotation.zh: 200+ 文件构建的生产级基础设施
